title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF ILAYANG BASIAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAPALONGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, INTO BARRIO SAN PEDRO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2934 / 51 OG No. 7, 3390 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1316, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF ILAYANG BASIAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAPALONGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, INTO BARRIO SAN PEDRO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Section 1. The sitio of Ilayang Basiad in the Municipality of Capalonga, Province of Camarines Norte, is converted into barrio San Pedro of said municipality.

Sec. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
